// ── 2027 CONFIRMED CALENDAR EVENTS ────────────────────────────────────────── // Auto-generated from 2027_Economic_Calendar_Master spreadsheet // 117 confirmed events · Market Holidays · FOMC · Economic Releases // To update: re-run the generator or edit events directly below function buildConfirmedEvents() { return [ { "id": 10000, "title": "New Year's Day – NYSE/NASDAQ Closed", "name": "NYSE / NASDAQ", "ticker": "", "time": "", "aka": "Market Holiday", "source": "https://www.nyse.com", "impact": "high", "date": "2027-01-01", "endDate": "", "showMini": true, "frequency": "annually", "measures": "", "whyMatters": "All U.S. equity markets closed", "details": "", "logo": "https://img.logo.dev/nyse.com", "hero": "" }, { "id": 10001, "title": "ISM Manufacturing PMI — Dec 2026", "name": "Institute for Supply Management", "ticker": "", "time": "10:00 AM ET", "aka": "Economic Release", "source": "https://www.ismworld.org", "impact": "high", "date": "2027-01-04", "endDate": "", "showMini": true, "frequency": "monthly", "measures": "Manufacturing sector activity — new orders, production, employment, inventories, supplier deliveries", "whyMatters": "A reading above 50 signals expansion; below 50 signals contraction. One of the most-watched leading indicators of U.S. economic health and a key input for Fed policy decisions.", "details": "", "logo": "https://img.logo.dev/ismworld.org", "hero": "" }, { "id": 10002, "title": "ISM Services PMI — Dec 2026", "name": "Institute for Supply Management", "ticker": "", "time": "10:00 AM ET", "aka": "Economic Release", "source": "https://www.ismworld.org", "impact": "high", "date": "2027-01-06", "endDate": "", "showMini": true, "frequency": "monthly", "measures": "Services sector activity — business activity, new orders, employment, prices paid", "whyMatters": "Services represent ~80% of U.S. GDP. This report gives a real-time read on the dominant sector of the economy and is closely watched by the Federal Reserve.", "details": "", "logo": "https://img.logo.dev/ismworld.org", "hero": "" }, { "id": 10003, "title": "December 2026 Jobs Report (NFP)", "name": "Bureau of Labor Statistics", "ticker": "", "time": "8:30 AM ET", "aka": "Economic Release", "source": "https://www.bls.gov/schedule", "impact": "high", "date": "2027-01-08", "endDate": "", "showMini": true, "frequency": "monthly", "measures": "Non-Farm Payrolls (NFP), unemployment rate, labor force participation, average hourly earnings", "whyMatters": "The single most market-moving monthly data release. Strong job growth can signal Fed rate hikes; weak data can signal cuts. Directly impacts equities, bonds, the dollar, and gold.", "details": "", "logo": "https://img.logo.dev/bls.gov", "hero": "" }, { "id": 10004, "title": "December 2026 CPI Release", "name": "Bureau of Labor Statistics", "ticker": "", "time": "8:30 AM ET", "aka": "Economic Release", "source": "https://www.bls.gov/schedule", "impact": "high", "date": "2027-01-13", "endDate": "", "showMini": true, "frequency": "monthly", "measures": "Consumer Price Index — headline CPI and core CPI (ex food & energy), YoY and MoM", "whyMatters": "The primary consumer inflation gauge watched by the Fed and markets. Surprises above or below consensus trigger major moves in equities, Treasuries, and currencies.", "details": "", "logo": "https://img.logo.dev/bls.gov", "hero": "" }, { "id": 10005, "title": "PPI — December 2026", "name": "Bureau of Labor Statistics", "ticker": "", "time": "8:30 AM ET", "aka": "Economic Release", "source": "https://www.bls.gov/schedule", "impact": "high", "date": "2027-01-14", "endDate": "", "showMini": true, "frequency": "monthly", "measures": "Producer Price Index — wholesale pricing pressure for finished goods, intermediate goods, and services", "whyMatters": "A leading indicator of future consumer inflation. Rate decisions and the press conference are among the most market-moving events of the year — affecting equities, bonds, currencies, and commodities globally.", "details": "", "logo": "https://img.logo.dev/federalreserve.gov", "hero": "" }, { "id": 10009, "title": "GDP Advance Estimate — Q4 2026", "name": "Bureau of Economic Analysis", "ticker": "", "time": "8:30 AM ET", "aka": "Economic Release", "source": "https://www.bea.gov/news/schedule", "impact": "high", "date": "2027-01-28", "endDate": "", "showMini": true, "frequency": "quarterly", "measures": "Gross Domestic Product — real GDP growth rate (advance, second, and third estimates)", "whyMatters": "The broadest measure of U.S. economic output. Rising PPI often flows through to CPI, giving markets early warning on inflation trends ahead of Fed action.", "details": "", "logo": "https://img.logo.dev/bls.gov", "hero": "" }, { "id": 10083, "title": "Housing Starts & Building Permits — Aug 2027", "name": "U.S. Census Bureau / HUD", "ticker": "", "time": "8:30 AM ET", "aka": "Economic Release", "source": "https://www.census.gov", "impact": "medium", "date": "2027-09-17", "endDate": "", "showMini": true, "frequency": "monthly", "measures": "New residential construction — housing starts (annualized) and building permits issued", "whyMatters": "A leading indicator of construction activity, homebuilder stocks, and consumer confidence in the housing market. Highly sensitive to mortgage rates driven by Fed policy.", "details": "", "logo": "https://img.logo.dev/census.gov", "hero": "" }, { "id": 10084, "title": "FOMC Meeting & Rate Decision", "name": "Federal Reserve", "ticker": "", "time": "2:00 PM ET", "aka": "Fed / FOMC", "source": "https://www.federalreserve.gov", "impact": "high", "date": "2027-09-21", "endDate": "2027-09-22", "showMini": true, "frequency": "six-weeks", "measures": "Federal Funds Rate target range", "whyMatters": "The FOMC sets the benchmark interest rate that influences all borrowing costs in the economy. Rate decisions and the press conference are among the most market-moving events of the year — affecting equities, bonds, currencies, and commodities globally.", "details": "", "logo": "https://img.logo.dev/federalreserve.gov", "hero": "" }, { "id": 10085, "title": "August 2027 PCE / Personal Income & Spending", "name": "Bureau of Economic Analysis", "ticker": "", "time": "8:30 AM ET", "aka": "Economic Release", "source": "https://www.bea.gov/news/schedule", "impact": "high", "date": "2027-09-24", "endDate": "", "showMini": true, "frequency": "monthly", "measures": "Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) price index — headline and core; Personal Income and Spending", "whyMatters": "The Fed's explicitly preferred inflation gauge with a 2% target. This is the single most important monthly inflation reading for FOMC rate decisions.", "details": "", "logo": "https://img.logo.dev/bea.gov", "hero": "" }, { "id": 10086, "title": "GDP Third Estimate — Q2 2027 + Corp Profits", "name": "Bureau of Economic Analysis", "ticker": "", "time": "8:30 AM ET", "aka": "Economic Release", "source": "https://www.bea.gov/news/schedule", "impact": "high", "date": "2027-09-30", "endDate": "", "showMini": true, "frequency": "quarterly", "measures": "Gross Domestic Product — real GDP growth rate (advance, second, and third estimates)", "whyMatters": "The broadest measure of U.S. economic output.
